ogTitle: Holsworthy vs Holts Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Holsworthy vs Holts Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Holsworthy, New South Wales and Holts Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Holts Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Holsworthy (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Holsworthy or Holts Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Holsworthy has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Holts Flat scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Holsworthy scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Holts Flat scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Holsworthy or Holts Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Holts Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
